shelfmark: PUL Islamic Manuscripts, Third Series no. 584e.10 (Michaelides 10)
description: Religious text mentioning the name of Saʻīd ibn Ḥasan al-Talimsānī. [Described on the paper wrapper as : "Poeme religieux d'un poëte inconnu" ; on a separate small piece of paper : "Poems of an unknown poet" ; [next line, in red] : "religious"].
description_he: טקסט דתי המזכיר את שמו של סעיד אבן חסן אל-תלמסאני.
